package rulecoverage

func NegativeLeadingWildcardBuilderChain() string {
    ruleID := "leading_wildcard_builder_chain"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "LIKE queries with leading wildcards that prevent index usage."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
